zh.title: 西尔维娅·布朗预言全集 - 美国著名灵媒14条预言与验证 | Sylvia Browne Prophecies
zh.description: 美国著名灵媒西尔维娅·布朗（1936-2013）的14条预言完整收录与验证。她在2008年著作《End of Days》中预言2020年前后将出现类肺炎疫情，引发全球关注。同时记录其多次争议性错误预言。

en.title: Sylvia Browne Prophecies - 14 Predictions from the American Psychic (1936-2013) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: American psychic Sylvia Browne (1936-2013) made 14 notable predictions across her career. Her 2008 book 'End of Days' predicted a pneumonia-like illness around 2020. Also includes her controversial wrong predictions in missing persons cases.
